triggers.on-pr: Run when a pull request is created or updated
triggers.on-push: Run on every push to a tracked branch
triggers.on-session-start: Run when an agent session starts
triggers.on-session-end: Run when an agent session ends
triggers.daily: Run once per day at the configured time
triggers.weekly: Run once per week on the configured day/time

routines.name: Watch PR checks
routines.description: Monitor required CI checks and report failures early

routines.name: Daily security scan
routines.description: Scan dependencies, secrets, and risky config changes every day

routines.name: Weekly backlog grooming
routines.description: Review the backlog, close completed items, and reprioritize the next tasks

routines.name: Session memory sync
routines.description: Persist decisions, blockers, and durable preferences when a session ends

routines.name: Dependency health check
routines.description: Review dependency freshness and surface upgrade opportunities without auto-updating
